channel.title: Learning on Adventures in Data Science
channel.description: Recent content in Learning on Adventures in Data Science

item.title: Data, Math, Coding, Politics?
item.description: Getting my hands on the data to begin this project has been exceptionally difficult. In addition to the regular issues within a department such as mine, we have an added layer of bureaucracy in our overseeing agency. In short, there are three gatekeepers of our juvenile court data: Our data people, our contractor, and the state agency that signs the contracts. Each department has their own concerns and regulations regarding this data.

item.title: The Inevitability of (Missing) Deadlines
item.description: Friday night is date night. I should not promise to show my work when a date with my wife is on the line. While that post is still on the horizon, I also wanted to share more about my ongoing education in R and statistics. Specifically, that I purchased and have begun reading An Introduction to Statistical Learning. I have the e-book version. Like reading Watchmen for the first time, my plan is to read a chapter a night and do those excercises in the day.
